title: Fluidloggable
description: A fork & extension for fluidlogged mod
body:
## About 
### Fluidloggable
- A fork of the mod [Fluidlogged](https://modrinth.com/mod/fluidlogged) that made **ALL vanilla blocks fluidloggable**.   
 
- Including some functional blocks like piston arm, which could produce many interesting mechs!   

- There's also an empty tag called _custom_fluidloggable_ where you can add custom mod support!
- Currently supports 1.21.1.
- Still in beta test, bugs may occour.
### Original intro
> This mod allows literally any block to be waterloggable with any fluid and also allows them to pass through blocks. This done by separating fluids from all blockstates in each chunk which solves startup time and memory usage when a lot of mods are installed.
